title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 17, 2024
summary: July 17, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a greater rate of 10.49% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 9.17%), from the level on 07/11/2024 of 8.540 M km 2 to 7.644 M km 2 for this week. This is the first double digit percentage loss this year. Plot Compiled by...

title: 9th Circuit Court judges hear oral appeals for king salmon troll fishery lawsuit
summary: Attorney Laura Wolff (bottom left) speaks on behalf of the State of Alaska in front of judges Mark Bennett, Milan Smith Jr., and Anthony Johnstone on July 18, 2024, from the 9th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals in San Francisco. (Screenshot from video livestream ) On Thursday, July 18, the 9th District Court of Appeals heard cases for and against a lower court ruling that threatened to halt Southeast Alaska’s troll fishery for king or chinook salmon.
